zh.Checkenden, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾肯登
zh.Boarstall, Buckinghamshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾波阿斯塔爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Harlyungrugge於1343年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾肯登時，她的父親William Harlyungrugge28歲，母親Alice Marmion24歲。她於1367年5月與John Reade在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年5月20日在她的家鄉享年85歲，埋葬在英國波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Harlyungrugge于1343年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾肯登时，她的父亲William Harlyungrugge28岁，母亲Alice Marmion24岁。她于1367年5月与John Reade在英国波克夏结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年5月20日在她的家乡享年85岁，埋葬在英国波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Harlyungrugge was born in 1343, in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Harlyungrugge, was 28 and her mother, Alice Marmion, was 24. She married John Reade in May 1367, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 May 1428, in her hometown, at the age of 85, and was buried in Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Harlyungrugge est née en 1343, à Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Harlyungrugge, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice Marmion, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Reade en mai 1367, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Harlyungrugge 1343 in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Harlyungrugge 28 und ihre Mutter Alice Marmion 24. Sie hat im Mai 1367 in Berkshire, England John Reade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1428 im Alter von 85 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Harlyungrugge è nata il nel 1343 nel Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Harlyungrugge, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Alice Marmion, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Reade nel maggio 1367, nel Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1428, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Harlyungruggeが1343年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチェクエンドンで生まれた時，父William Harlyungruggeは28歳，母Alice Marmionは24歳であった。1367年5月にイギリスバークシュアイアでJohn Readeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年5月20日に故郷で85歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Harlyungrugge(이)가 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 체c켄던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Harlyungrugge(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Marmion(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1367년 5월 영국 버크실르에서 John Reade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 5월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Harlyungrugge nasceu em 1343, em Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Harlyungrugge, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice Marmion, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Reade em maio de 1367, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de maio de 1428, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Harlyungrugge родилась в 1343 г. в местности чеккендон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Harlyungrugge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Marmion, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Reade май 1367 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 мая 1428 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Harlyungrugge nació en 1343, en Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Harlyungrugge, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice Marmion, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Reade en mayo de 1367, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1428, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Berkshire, Inglaterra.
